title: parafestuca albida
intro: Parafestuca albida, also known as Mountain Fescue, is a type of grass-like perennial plant belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Mountain Fescue is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
